overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a survival horror game, showing a character walking through a dense foggy forest at night. The player moves steadily along a narrow dirt path surrounded by tall pine trees and thick mist, with the character's hand briefly visible holding an object.

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a dark foggy forest at night, with the camera moving forward along a narrow dirt path. Tall pine trees flank both sides of the trail, partially visible through the dense mist that limits visibility to the center distance.

segments.scene_description: The character continues walking through the dense foggy forest, briefly raising their left hand to hold what appears to be a map or torch. The right side tree passes out of view while the left side tree moves closer to the camera as the path winds deeper into the misty woods.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement through a dark, oppressive forest that winds deeper into a dense nocturnal mist. It begins by gliding along a narrow dirt path where tall pine trees flank the trail, their forms partially obscured by a thick fog that limits visibility. As the camera advances, the character briefly raises their left hand to hold a map or torch, momentarily breaking the silhouette of the surroundings. The scene then shifts as the path curves, causing the trees on the right to recede from view while the foliage on the left draws closer to the lens. This steady progression finally pulls the viewer further into the heart of the misty woods, where the environment becomes increasingly enclosed by the surrounding pines.
